allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking helps jobs-to-be-done strip away the familiar solution and recover the underlying need that actually matters.
allies.source_quote: JTBD operates like a form of arguing from first principles.

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking supports jobs-to-be-done by repeatedly questioning whether the team has identified the real job or only a convenient surface explanation.
Systems-thinking helps jobs-to-be-done connect the identified user purpose to the broader machine that must deliver that outcome.
allies.source_quote: structure the rest of the business or product as a machine

allies.rationale_text: Feynman-technique supports jobs-to-be-done by forcing the job definition into plain language before the team commits to a solution story.
allies.source_quote: Mitigation often relies on metacognition and using structured processes, like the Feynman Technique, to simplify the complex job definition into plain language.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts jobs-to-be-done when the team defines the job to fit a preferred solution instead of pressure-testing what the user is really hiring for.
antagonists.source_quote: Identifying the Job based on a desired conclusion or a pre-selected solution, rather than objective reality.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Jobs-to-be-done conflicts with confirmation-bias when the job definition is framed to confirm an existing product hypothesis rather than discovered from user evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: jobs-to-be-done conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when the job definition is framed to confirm an existing product hypothesis rather than discovered from user evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Jobs-to-be-done conflicts with simplification when reducing customer needs to a single job erases the multi-dimensional trade-offs that actually drive choice.
structured_tensions.source_quote: jobs-to-be-done conflicts with simplification (simplification) when reducing customer needs to a single job erases the multi-dimensional trade-offs that actually drive choice.

curation_notes.summary: The retained relation surface stays close to the source's strongest current-vocabulary interactions: first-principles, critical inquiry, systems purpose, and anti-solution-bias pressure.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader empathy or design-thinking expansion because the current vocabulary already supports a cleaner job-clarity surface.
open_questions: The source is clearer on ally pressure than on explicit current-vocabulary tension blocks, so structured tensions stay omitted.
